text: A reflection  fo a man walking across a street while holding an umbrella.
Airplane contrails viewed through the branches of a tree.
A child sits on a couch with a controller.
A cat laying on top of a basket on a table with a mirror above it

A child riding a horse on the beach front
A person walking a dog down a city street.
A red stop sign sitting by the side of a road.
A crowd of people walking across a rain covered sidewalk holding umbrellas.
A boat goes across the water in front of buildings.
